artwork_entry_1.item1_medium.answer: Mixed media assemblage using reclaimed oak drawer front, Grandma Helen’s broken floral china teacups and saucers, thrifted silver-plated flatware, salvaged picture frame glass, found photography (family album scans printed on recycled cardstock), and hand-embroidered linen scraps from an old tablecloth

artwork_entry_2.item2_medium.answer: Wall sculpture constructed from reclaimed Chicago ‘L’ transit maps, decommissioned CTA Ventra cards, scrap copper wiring from a local electrician, rusted hardware from a demolished garage in Lemont, and offcuts of reclaimed barn wood sourced from a Will County farm

agreement_and_installation.special_requi.answer: Item 1: Please hang at eye level (center at approx. 60" from floor). Piece includes glass and small ceramic fragments; ensure it is securely anchored to a stud or load-bearing section of wall. Weight approx. 18 lbs; D-rings and hanging wire are already installed.

Item 2: Wall-mounted; weight approx. 14 lbs. Back includes French cleat; please use both pieces of cleat system provided and mount into studs if possible. Avoid direct sunlight to prevent further fading of vintage paper elements.
